# BP-1 positive: discarded error return
lang: go
file: BP-1-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "os"

func WriteFile(path string, data []byte) {
	_ = os.WriteFile(path, data, 0644)
}

func MultiDiscard(path string) {
	// second blank is typically the error return
	_, _ = os.ReadFile(path)
	data, _ := os.ReadFile(path)
	_ = data
}
